acceptance_criteria: The validation readiness-evaluation workflow exits successfully.
The validation gate records passing evidence in status/readiness.json.
completion_signals: Validation evaluation evidence is recorded under eval/history and linked from status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Validation reports schema or contract failures that the current task scope cannot resolve safely.
tasks.summary: Run the validation readiness-evaluation workflow and capture canonical validation evidence.

acceptance_criteria: The ordered hint lifecycle helper exits successfully for lane first-alpha.
A checkpoint artifact is written under eval/history.
completion_signals: An ordered-hint-lifecycle-checkpoint-result.json artifact is recorded under eval/history for lane first-alpha.
Canonical work-state advances after the first-alpha checkpoint completes.
escalation_conditions: The helper cannot read canonical state or write bounded evidence under eval/history.
tasks.summary: Record operator-reporting refinement checkpoint evidence after validation passes.

acceptance_criteria: The ordered hint lifecycle helper exits successfully for lane first-beta.

completion_signals: An ordered-hint-lifecycle-checkpoint-result.json artifact is recorded under eval/history for lane first-beta.
Canonical work-state advances after the first-beta checkpoint completes.
escalation_conditions: The helper cannot read canonical state or write bounded evidence under eval/history.
tasks.summary: Record schema-validation refinement checkpoint evidence after validation passes.

completion_signals: An ordered-hint-lifecycle-checkpoint-result.json artifact is recorded under eval/history for lane second-gamma.
Canonical work-state advances after the second-gamma checkpoint completes.
escalation_conditions: The helper cannot read canonical state or write bounded evidence under eval/history.
tasks.summary: Record semantic follow-up checkpoint evidence after both first-branch tasks complete.

acceptance_criteria: The ordered hint lifecycle helper exits successfully for lane second-delta.

tasks.summary: Record auxiliary follow-up checkpoint evidence after both first-branch tasks complete.

acceptance_criteria: The benchmark readiness-evaluation workflow exits successfully.
Inherited benchmark gates update from not_run to pass or waived.
completion_signals: Benchmark evaluation evidence records results in eval/latest/index.json.
Required benchmark gates advance to pass or waived in status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Benchmark output fails to update readiness or eval state through the existing bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Run the benchmark readiness-evaluation workflow after validation passes.
